[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/36741245:sfWyVqYUN:m:1:876315805:16B1FCE5A5555F1AA87839373C7CBF1E:r) Peter,

**_LAST CHANCE TO HAVE YOUR JULY SUPPORT MATCHED!_
[MAKE A GENEROUS DONATION BEFORE MIDNIGHT](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/36741245:sfWyVqYUN:m:1:876315805:16B1FCE5A5555F1AA87839373C7CBF1E:r)**
This has been an incredible month for our campaign - all of my supporters have been amazing.

_We 're surging in the polls because patriotic and fed-up Americans are helping us build winning momentum all across the country._

And the more people hear from Hillary, the more her numbers DROP and mine skyrocket!

We have to keep up this great work right on through Election Day. That's why I announced that if we raise another $2 million by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT - the FEC's end-of-month deadline - **I will _personally_ write a check for $2 million, to match every contribution dollar-for-dollar.**

Now we have JUST HOURS until our matching gift deadline expires, I'm asking you to make a contribution to our movement.

[**You can make an immediate impact with a gift of $250, $100, $50, or $25 by following this secure link.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/36741245:sfWyVqYUN:m:1:876315805:16B1FCE5A5555F1AA87839373C7CBF1E:r)

I hope you will take advantage of this opportunity, Peter - you'll help us hit our fundraising goal, and **DOUBLE the impact of your support** to put America first again.

The career politicians have created a huge mess in Washington. I am tired of seeing our people taken advantage of, and _I know you are too._

We're going to rebuild our economy, rebuild our crumbling infrastructure, rebuild our military, and rebuild real faith in a better tomorrow for every one of our citizens...

...we can do ALL of this, Peter! But first, we must build and run the best campaign the American people have ever seen.

**That is what it will take to dump the dishonest politicians like Crooked Hillary and end the rigged system for good.**

Stand with our campaign TODAY to help us head into August strong.

**Help us hit this critical goal and DOUBLE the impact of your support.**

[CONTRIBUTE $250 = $500 MATCHED](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/36741246:sfWyVqYUN:m:1:876315805:16B1FCE5A5555F1AA87839373C7CBF1E:r) [CONTRIBUTE $100 = $200 MATCHED](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/36741247:sfWyVqYUN:m:1:876315805:16B1FCE5A5555F1AA87839373C7CBF1E:r) [CONTRIBUTE $50 = $100 MATCHED](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/36741248:sfWyVqYUN:m:1:876315805:16B1FCE5A5555F1AA87839373C7CBF1E:r) [CONTRIBUTE $25 = $50 MATCHED](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/36741249:sfWyVqYUN:m:1:876315805:16B1FCE5A5555F1AA87839373C7CBF1E:r) [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/36741245:sfWyVqYUN:m:1:876315805:16B1FCE5A5555F1AA87839373C7CBF1E:r)
Let's keep up the work and win for America.

Best Wishes,

Donald J. Trump
Republican Nominee for President of the United States

[**P.S. This $2 million matching gift deadline is at MIDNIGHT TONIGHT! With JUST HOURS to go, please make your most generous contribution right away.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/36741245:sfWyVqYUN:m:1:876315805:16B1FCE5A5555F1AA87839373C7CBF1E:r)

body:
Let's get back to work | Peter --

What an incredible, historic week! I’m so glad we got to show the world what our party is fighting for -- love, inclusion, and the belief that when we stand indivisible, we are truly invincible.

But with the falling of those red, white, and blue balloons comes the start of the final leg of the campaign. The general election has arrived -- meaning that after we take a moment to celebrate the history we’ve already made, we need to get right back to the grind, doing everything we can to ensure that Donald Trump isn’t dancing at any inaugural balls come January 20, 2017.

We have the best candidate, team, and platform -- but in order for us to come out on top in November, we’re going to need our July fundraising report to reflect the strength of our ticket and the passion of our supporters. We need to paint battleground states like Florida and Ohio blue -- and to do that, I need to ask a little more of you.

**It's the general. There’s no more time to waste. Can you chip in before midnight tonight? When you make your first donation, we’ll send you a free sticker:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYxMTc0NjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQ0NjM5NjkyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Robby

Hillary for America

| We've known since we launched our campaign that this Florida race could decide control of the Senate.

And now, this week, we've seen the ugliness of the GOP on display in Cleveland. **Those dark forces will stop at NOTHING to defeat us and keep the Senate in their clutches.**

Shady push polls are being launched against us in key areas across the state. Republicans are outspending us 2-1. And this week, Rubio's first ad hit Florida airwaves -- and it's a misleading attack on Patrick. If they drown out our message, we'll be in trouble. **[Can you contribute NOW to help us push back?](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c9b/738133e4/374e811d/7f82f80d/713478821/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160731?refcode=pme160731_m&recurring=true&amount=25")**

Imagine this: a Donald Trump presidency, a GOP Senate with Mitch McConnell at the head, Marco Rubio continuing to let Florida families down, and a Supreme Court with SIX conservative justices. We just can't let that happen.

**Winning in Florida is a MUST to stop the party of Trump.** With so much on the line, this deadline is even more important. name: Rob Portman
subject: 100 days
body:
| Peter,

100 days. That’s all that’s left until Election Day and the campaign is really starting to heat up.

This week, I was honored to be endorsed by the Ohio Conference of Teamsters and the Ohio Fraternal Order of Police. They know we can’t afford a return to the days of Governor Ted Strickland when Ohio lost over 350,000 jobs and ranked 48th in job creation.

But it’s not over, Peter. Polls are showing that this race is still tight and it is crucial we hit every fundraising goal for the next 100 days.

[Will you contribute $100 before midnight tonight to help meet our online fundraising goal of $25,000?](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcontribute.robportman.com%2Fgrassroots_fund%3Fcampaign_id%3Da6b2b9b2c5614daeefa204f33afc9ab7%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26utm_campaign%3Deom_july_6&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eom_july_6&n=1) [**

National Democrats have already committed over $32 million in false attack ads against me and I need your help to fight back.

**[Double your impact: Contribute $100 immediately>>>](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcontribute.robportman.com%2Fgrassroots_fund%3Fcampaign_id%3Da6b2b9b2c5614daeefa204f33afc9ab7%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26utm_campaign%3Deom_july_6&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eom_july_6&n=3)**

name: Diane Bedwell, JayInslee.com
subject: Michelle Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Unity is what we're about. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTI4MDc2MAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTYyNDQ3MjUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
| Friend -- | _**"...when someone is cruel or acts like a bully, you don't stoop to their level. No, our motto is, when they go low, we go high."**_
---

subject: By midnight tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
Let's go! | Peter --

I am so grateful for all you have done and continue to do. You’re an essential part of my team, and I’m glad to have made it this far with you by my side.

| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
**July 31, 2016**

**Media Contact:**
Ethan Latour
[ethan@philscott.org](mailto:ethan@philscott.org)
802-595-3776
**PHIL SCOTT EARNS ENDORSEMENT OF BURLINGTON FREE PRESS, VERMONT'S LARGEST DAILY NEWSPAPER**
_The Daily Newspaper Says Scott is Best Prepared Republican to Take the Reins as Governor_
**Middlesex, Vt., July 31, 2016 –** The _Burlington Free Press_ endorsed Phil Scott for the Republican gubernatorial nomination, highlighting Scott’s public and private sector experience, his character and his ability to get things done.

“Scott balances his experience in government with his first-hand knowledge of what it’s like to own and operate a small business in Vermont,” said the _Free Press_ in its endorsement. “Scott’s record in the Statehouse says he understands that governing is more than bold statements and flashy initiatives, and that the true service to the people often happens in little ways that make life just a little less difficult for Vermonters,” the paper continued.

“I’m proud to earn the endorsement of Vermont’s largest daily newspaper, and grateful to its editorial board for closely evaluating my record and my proposals, and recognizing my history of fighting for Vermonters,” said Scott. “I will, as the paper notes, continue fighting to strengthen our economy, make Vermont more affordable for all Vermonters and restore faith and trust in government.”

Beyond his experience and ability to work with others to truly impact Vermonters’ lives, the _Free Press_ also describes how Scott plans to lead in a way that will get things done as Governor.

“Scott says he will deal with state matters with a firm hand when necessary. He calls for holding the legislative session to 90 days, transitioning to a two-year budget cycle and reigning in the spending even if it means a budget veto,” wrote the _Free Press_ , concluding “Scott is the Republican candidate with the resume that shows he is best prepared to take the reins of state government with a steady hand.”

Read the full endorsement from the _Burlington Free Press_ [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c78e20c5ed&e=19cebfe173).

**Listen, Learn, Lead: Meet Phil Scott**

Lieutenant Governor Phil Scott has been a consistent voice of reason and common sense in Montpelier. As the only Republican elected to statewide office, Phil has shown determination and leadership in advocating for Vermonters and promoting policies and programs that benefit Vermont families and the economy. Read about Phil Scott’s plans at [www.philscott.org](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=16d32d3385&e=19cebfe173).

Friend -- You've gotten emails from a few members of our team. Now I'm writing, to tell you what's at stake this November.

Our country could keep traveling down the path of extreme partisanship, divisiveness, and obstruction. **Or we could elect Evan Bayh, who puts Hoosier interests over special interests and the common good over partisanship.**

**[Will you chip in before midnight tonight to help elect Evan to the Senate?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50421/7be36b49/1edf3bd3/78f8c0a9/3393557007/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-julyeom?refcode=20160731&amount=25")** We're just a little short of our $30,000 end-of-month goal. **Your donation could put us over the top!**

The fact that the Koch brothers have already dumped one million dollars into this race shows a couple of things. (1) This race is a big deal -- it will be pivotal to the direction of our country after November. (2) The Kochs are scared because Evan is a real threat to special interests.

But to fight back against the Kochs, uber-partisan Todd Young, and the champions of gridlock, we need to band together to help Evan win. **[So I'm asking you to dig deep and pitch in to Evan's campaign before tonight's end-of-month deadline.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50421/7be36b49/1edf3bd3/78f8c0a9/3393557007/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-julyeom?refcode=20160731&amount=25")** Thanks for your help,

Paul Tencher
Campaign Manager, Evan Bayh for Indiana [Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50421/7be36b49/1edf3bd3/78f8c0a9/3393557007/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-julyeom?refcode=20160731&amount=25")
